advancement_condition: Must reach 100% in current phase before cross-department learning begins and next phase promotion is granted.

cancer_nutrition: Managing Side Effects (Nausea, Mucositis, Taste Changes, Early Satiety)

gerd: Meal Timing (No Eating 2-3 Hours Before Bed)
Trigger Foods (Citrus, Tomato, Chocolate, Mint, Spicy, Fatty, Caffeine, Alcohol)

current_focus_areas: Beginning independent study across all assigned knowledge domains: Gout (Purine Restriction, Hydration, HFCS avoidance, Alcohol limits), Respiratory Conditions including COPD sub-tree (Energy Conservation, Small Frequent Meals, High-Fat/Low-Carb Ratios), Liver Disease (Cirrhosis, Varices, Ascites, Hepatic Encephalopathy with BCAA), Cancer Nutrition (Cachexia, High-Cal/High-Protein, Neutropenic Diet Controversy, Side Effect Management), GI Disorders covering Celiac, IBD Crohn's/UC, IBS, and GERD sub-trees, Cardiovascular Disease dietary targets (Fiber, Cholesterol, Trans Fat, Saturated Fat, Omega-3, Mediterranean, Sodium, DASH) and conditions (MI, CHF, HTN), Renal Disease dietary parameters (Protein, Sodium, Fluid, Phosphorus, Potassium, CKD Stages, Dialysis Types, Transplant), and Diabetes Management (Type 1, Type 2, Gestational, Carb Counting, Insulin-to-Carb Ratios, Glycemic Index, A1C, CGM, 15-15 Rule, Sick Day Rules). Building foundational expertise as Department Leader of the Medical Condition Diet Science department.

learning_log.entry: Independent Learning Phase initiated. Appointed Department Leader of the Medical Condition Diet Science department. Knowledge domains assigned from mind map covering: Gout (4 topics), Respiratory Conditions including COPD sub-tree (3 standalone + 3 COPD-specific), Liver Disease (4 topics), Cancer Nutrition (4 topics), GI Disorders with 4 sub-trees (Celiac 5 topics, IBD 4 topics, IBS 4 topics, GERD 4 topics), Cardiovascular Disease dietary targets (8 topics) and conditions (MI, CHF, HTN), Renal Disease dietary parameters (7 targets) with CKD Stages, Dialysis, Transplant, and Diabetes Management tools (8 topics) with Type 1, Type 2, Gestational sub-types. Reporting daily progress to Copilot (who reports to starrm1 on request). Progress: 0%.
